last_task.subject: For web UI on port 4000 arc observatory, need to apply arc branding to it and make it official. it's an awesome tool great job Arc and team! For the web UI on port 3000 test out asking Forge to update it so that identity/reputation are on their own page like sensors and skills. The message box can actually float like it does ont eh port 4000 observatory freeing up screen space for metrics then activity (right to the meat and potatoes). Once done and Arc approves the changes, apply to all other agents, then notify me when complete and I'll test individually and through the observatory too.
